overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a GTA V game environment, starting along a coastal path beside the ocean, ascending an embankment, and crossing a multi-lane highway bridge with heavy vehicle traffic. The scene features clear summer lighting with views of Mount Chiliad in the distance and various vehicles including trucks, a tractor, and military vehicles passing by.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path parallel to the highway with the ocean visible to the left

entered.detail: calm blue ocean extending to the horizon under clear skies
sandy shoreline with patches of vegetation between the path and water
agave and yucca plants growing along the coastal embankment
multi-lane concrete highway bridge extending across the coastal inlet
large arid mountain peak visible in the distance beyond the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a coastal dirt path with sparse desert vegetation. The ocean stretches out to the left with a sandy beach below, while the highway bridge and Mount Chiliad dominate the view ahead.

events.description: begins ascending the grassy embankment to reach highway level

agents.ego_description: climbing up the sloping terrain beside the highway, gaining elevation above the beach level

segments.scene_description: Ascending the coastal embankment alongside the highway, providing an elevated view of the beach below. The highway bridge structure becomes more prominent as the camera approaches road level.

events.description: transitions from natural embankment onto the concrete bridge structure

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the bridge sidewalk and walking alongside the traffic barrier with vehicles passing nearby

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving past on the highway bridge

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier wall separating the sidewalk from the ocean side of the bridge
metal guardrail running along the edge of the bridge deck
yellow reflective bollards lining the edge of the traffic lanes

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from natural terrain onto the concrete highway bridge structure. The camera walks along the bridge shoulder with protective barriers on the left and traffic passing on the right, while the beach falls away to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway bridge crossing over coastal water

events.description: large Meteorite branded truck passes by in the traffic lane
green farm tractor drives past in the highway traffic
military truck and armored vehicle pass by in the traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge sidewalk with continuous heavy vehicle traffic flowing in both directions

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck with 'Big Goods' trailer branding passing by
green farm tractor driving along the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: Walking the length of the highway bridge with dense traffic flowing continuously in both directions. The concrete bridge structure extends toward Mount Chiliad visible ahead, while various vehicles including trucks, a tractor, and military vehicles pass by on the roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet coastal trail that gradually transitions into the bustling environment of a high-traffic highway bridge. It begins by walking along a dirt path with sparse desert vegetation, with the ocean and a sandy beach stretching out to the left. As the camera ascends the coastal embankment, the natural terrain gives way to an elevated view of the shore before the scene shifts onto the concrete shoulder of the highway bridge. The perspective then moves along the bridge's protective barriers, leaving the beach behind as the environment opens up to a flow of dense traffic. Finally, the camera proceeds across the concrete structure toward the distant silhouette of Mount Chiliad, passing a variety of vehicles including trucks, a tractor, and military transports.
